context.goal: Establish a stable post-reset baseline before functional checking.
stimulus_intent: Assert the detected reset using the inferred polarity.
Release reset conservatively and observe interface stabilization.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Verify fundamental edge detection behavior for both rising and falling edges under normal operation.
stimulus_intent: Drive a representative legal input pattern across known inputs: ['clk', 'rst_n', 'a']
Toggle a from 0→1 and 1→0 with sufficient idle cycles between toggles to isolate each edge.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.
Observe outputs on the clock cycle immediately after each a transition.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Exercise extreme and rapid edge patterns to confirm correct one‑cycle pulse generation for both edges.
stimulus_intent: Use zero-like, one-like, and boundary patterns on ['known inputs']
Apply constant 0, constant 1, and a 0→1→0 toggle sequence with minimal idle cycles.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.
Conservative clocked observation: check outputs on each rising edge of clk.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Observe repeated or back-to-back legal operations under conservative timing assumptions.
stimulus_intent: Apply two legal operations with minimal idle spacing that remains safe for the current contract strength.
timing_assumptions: Advance through conservative clocked observations.
Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Validate that asserting reset asynchronously to the clock does not cause undefined output states.
stimulus_intent: Assert rst_n low for 2 cycles while toggling a on the preceding cycle, then release reset and observe outputs.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs on the next rising edge after reset deassertion.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

context.goal: Confirm deterministic behavior across repeated identical stimulus sequences.
stimulus_intent: Drive a rising edge on a, observe rise=1, then after idle cycles drive another identical rising edge and verify identical output timing.
timing_assumptions: Conservative observation: check outputs on the clock cycle immediately following each edge.

instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.

fill_warnings: Experimental TODO fill metadata is present, but the default mainline pipeline remains render -> run -> triage.

generated_files.description: Marks the rendered cocotb test directory as a Python package.
Conservative DUT interface helpers derived from the contract artifact.
Thin environment wrapper that composes interface, timing-safe waits, and coverage helpers.
Structured oracle helper functions rendered from the oracle artifact.
Stable runtime helpers exposed to LLM-filled stimulus and oracle TODO blocks.
Coverage scaffold rendered from plan coverage tags for later execution stages.
Rendered basic cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Rendered edge cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Phase 4 executable Makefile shell; Phase 5 injects run-time variables and executes it.

context.pass_condition: If a transitions 0→1, then on the next rising edge of clk rise == 1 and on the following edge rise == 0. If a transitions 1→0, then on the next rising edge of clk down == 1 and on the following edge down == 0. No other cycles may assert the same pulse without a new transition.
context.trigger_condition: When a change on input a is observed.

render_warnings: Rendered Makefile is an executable Phase 4 shell; Phase 5 injects execution variables and selects the backend.
Task description was provided to the render stage but not used to invent new testbench semantics.
Spec text was provided to the render stage but only upstream artifacts were trusted for code generation.
Deterministic render remains the default mainline; post-render TODO fill is experimental and not required by the benchmark path.
